name: construction contractors processing 5–15 permits/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permits/month, manual submission causes delays that can result in project penalties. We automate digital submissions instead of manual submission of paper permits.
problem_solved: Manual submission of construction permits leads to delays and potential fines.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual submission of construction permits leads to delays and potential fines.
